CustomField.description: Displays a star rating image based on the lead score to help prioritize leads visually.
CustomField.formula: IF( Lead_Score__c < 10, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_000.gif", "0 Star"), IF( Lead_Score__c < 20, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_100.gif", "1 Star"), IF( Lead_Score__c < 30, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_200.gif", "2 Star"), IF( Lead_Score__c < 40, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_300.gif", "3 Star"), IF( Lead_Score__c < 50, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_400.gif", "4 Star"), IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_500.gif", "5 Star") ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the lead score as a star rating with alternate text for accessibility.
CustomField.label: Lead Rating
